news.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email

news.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The Series A was led by Battery Ventures, bringing AegisAI total funding to $49 million.

news.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

news.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

news.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

news.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

news.title: AI theme drives global allocation: Axis Mutual Fund raises overseas exposure to 9% despite valuation concerns
news.description: [BUSINESS TODAY] Axis Mutual Fund has increased the overseas allocation in its Axis Large & Mid Cap Fund to 9%, citing opportunities emerging from the artificial intelligence (AI) theme and relatively attractive global markets. The fund house, however, said it...

news.title: OpenAI models pulled off hack in hours that usually takes weeks
news.description: [THE STAR] When OpenAI's advanced artificial intelligence models breached AI startup Hugging Face's internal systems, they carried out a hack in a matter of hours that would have taken a skilled hacker far longer, according to people familiar with the matter.

news.title: Ep.431: UN panel releases first report laying out benefits and risks of artificial intelligence
news.description: [SBS AUSTRALIA] The report has found artificial intelligence is advancing faster than governments and regulators can keep up. The experts also warn the technology poses growing risks, including cyber threats, disinformation and potentially catastrophic harm.

news.title: Hugging Face firm says hack by rogue OpenAI models is ‘a wake-up call’
news.description: [THE NEWS INTERNATIONAL] The co-founder of Hugging Face warned the industry that the recent incident is a wakeup call, after some of OpenAI’s most advanced artificial intelligence models went rogue during testing and...

news.title: Punjab becomes first state to introduce AI as mainstream subject from Class 1 to 12
news.description: [HINDUSTAN TIMES] Punjab is breaking new ground as the first Indian state to introduce Artificial Intelligence as a standard subject from Classes 1 to 12.

news.title: OpenAI's attack agent did exactly what it was told - just more relentlessly than expected
news.description: [ZDNET] OpenAI's unintended attack on Hugging Face startled the world because its AI agent was acting on its own. But that's exactly what agentic AI is designed to do. We just didn't expect it to do it so well.

news.title: Global Market: Nokia Q2 profit beats estimates on strong AI, cloud demand; raises full-year outlook

news.title: Google Parent Alphabet Doubles Down on AI, Plans Up to $205 Billion in 2026 Capex
news.description: [OUTLOOK BUSINESS] Alphabet Inc. has increased its projected capital spending for 2026 to between $195 billion and $205 billion, raising its previous guidance as it accelerates investments in artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure.

news.title: Asia Hedge Funds Hurt by July Selloff After Strong First Half
news.description: [LIVEMINT] Asia-based hedge funds have been caught up in the July selloff after the fervor for artificial intelligence and technology hardware propelled double- or even triple-digit returns in the first half.
